meaning: n.<法>窥淫狂病人,偷看下流场面的人
examples: When had I become such a voyeur?
You're some kind of creepy voyeur.
The court papers allege she may be a voyeur.
The movies made at the Factory erased the distinction between artist and voyeur, creator and hanger-on.
But that's more as a voyeur than as someone who feels a sense of responsibility.
